module.name: badge
module.description: A filled badge. The text is the block body (spaces / commas / inline Markdown allowed). Renders inline.
module.aiSpec: A small filled pill/label for tags, statuses, or short emphasis (e.g. "New", "v2.0"). The body text is the badge label and may contain spaces, commas and inline markdown. Gotcha: declared as a block module but renders inline, so it sits within surrounding text/flow rather than on its own line. Example: `<!-- @badge color: #10b981 -->` then `Beta` then `<!-- @end -->`.

snippet.label: Badge
snippet.description: A filled badge. Body = the badge text.
